reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate PresenceGuard
reauth_confirm.description: Your Microsoft sign-in has expired (e.g. due to Conditional Access). Sign in again to keep setting your Teams status.

abort.missing_configuration: The integration is not configured. Add Application Credentials first.

application_credentials.description: Create an app registration in Entra ID (delegated, permission Presence.ReadWrite). Set the **Web** redirect URI to `{redirect_url}` and enter the Client ID and Client Secret here. Guide: {more_info_url}

set_offline.name: Set offline
set_offline.description: Sets the preferred Teams status to Offline (OffWork).
